title: Kernel orthestrationについて、codexだけでなくglmやclaudeとの協奏として設定されているか確認せよ
summary_text: - **Wording (core semantic fix):** in [`vote.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md#L30) and [`v.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/v.md#L30), replace current approval rule (`explicitly asked or strictly required`) with: `Default approval policy for /vote is no-approval continuation.` `Only request approval for critical/destructive operations (irreversible delete/reset/history rewrite, production data mutation, secret/credential rotation, external side-effect writes).` Keep everything else autonomous. - **Wording (consensus guarantee):** at the same section, raise from generic “2 lanes” to explicit multi-LLM quorum: `Planning/adjudication/final recommendation require Codex + Claude + GLM active lanes; otherwise return BLOCKED (do not silently degrade).` (Current wording at [`vote.md:32`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/vote.md#L32) is too weak for “multi-LLM consensus” semantics.) - **Runtime (single highest-value enforcement):** in guard, require bootstrap evidence presence for `/vote` path instead of allowing fallback to recent log window. Today guard can still pass via stale observed models if evidence is absent ([`cli.py:490`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/cli.py#L490), [`cli.py:496`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/cli.py#L496)). Minimal change: add env `CODEX_KERNEL_REQUIRE_BOOTSTRAP_EVIDENCE=1` from launcher for `vote|v`, and fail if `KERNEL_BOOTSTRAP_EVIDENCE_PATH` missing/unreadable. - **Runtime smoke (remove current false-positive mode):** stop using `/vote SMOKE_RESULT_MARKER=...` as primary runtime proof ([`check-codex-vote-prompt.sh:146`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh#L146)); that path is intentionally synthetic. Minimal replacement smoke should run normal `/vote <focus>` and assert: `Local consensus mode is active.` `Live bootstrap lane evidence:` `- claude: ok` `- glm: ok` and no `quiescence_timeout`/approval-fail output. - **Test contract update:** add static assertions in [`check-codex-vote-prompt.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh#L126) for the new phrases `no-approval continuation` and `critical/destructive operations only`, so policy drift is caught in CI.
